videoSnippet.title: "We're Getting Old" || Magnus vs Wesley So || Norway Chess 2026 + BONUS GAME
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Carlsen, Magnus (2840) - So, Wesley (2754) 
Norway Chess 2026 (Chess.com) [09] 2026.05.30
C50 Giuoco Pianissimo

1.e4 e5 2.Nf3 Nc6 3.Bc4 Nf6 4.d3 Bc5 5.Bg5 h6 6.Bh4 d6 7.c3 a5 8.O-O O-O 9.Nbd2 Ba7 10.a4 g5 11.Bg3 Kg7 12.Re1 g4 13.Nh4 Nh5 14.Nf1 Qg5 15.Ne3 Bxe3 16.Rxe3 Nf4 17.Qe1 Be6 18.f3 h5 19.Bb5 Ne7 20.d4 f6 21.Rd1 Neg6 22.Rd2 Rf7 23.Kh1 Kh7 24.d5 Bd7 25.Bxd7 Rxd7 26.Nf5 Ne7 27.Bh4 Qg6 28.Ng3 Qh6 29.c4 Rf8 30.Rb3 Nfg6 31.Nf1 Nxh4 32.Qxh4 f5 33.Qe1 fxe4 34.Qxe4+ Ng6 35.g3 Rdf7 36.Rf2 Qc1 37.Kg2 Rxf3 38.Rbxf3 gxf3+ 39.Rxf3 Qxb2+ 40.Kh3 Qd4 41.Qxd4 exd4 42.Rxf8 Nxf8 43.Kg2 Nd7 44.Nd2 Ne5 45.h3 Kg6 46.Kf2 Kg5 47.Kf1 Kf6 48.Kf2 Nd3+ 49.Ke2 Nb2 50.Nb3 Ke5 51.Nxa5 Ke4 52.g4 hxg4 53.hxg4 d3+ 54.Kd2 b6 55.Nb3 Nxc4+ 56.Kc3 d2 57.Kc2 Kxd5 58.g5 Ke5
